sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GERARD de Grandson (-[28 Sep 1233/18 May 1234]).

km.La Sarra, Vaud, Switzerland: វ៉ាuត, ស្វីស
km.Neuchâtel, Switzerland: នែueនប៊ើហ្គ, ស្វីស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz於1177年出生在瑞士瓦特時，他的父親Ebles IV de Grandson24歲，母親Beatrix Genève23歲。他和Antoinette d’Oron至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1233年9月28日享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz于1177年出生在瑞士瓦特时，他的父亲Ebles IV de Grandson24岁，母亲Beatrix Genève23岁。他和Antoinette d’Oron至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1233年9月28日享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sarraz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Gholam, Mehrdad, Pejman, Ramin, Afshin, Ali, Bishara, Fardin, Firouzeh, Fouad, Goli, Jamal.  Jewish Doron, Reuven.  Indian Sangeeta, Madhav.
Arabic and Jewish (from North Africa, Iraq, and Syria): occupational name from Arabic ṣarrāf ‘treasurer, paymaster, money changer’.
Indian: variant of   Saraf  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Sarafian
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Armenian Osep, Ara, Aram, Armenag, Armenouhi, Dicran, Hagop, Karapet, Khatchik, Masis, Minas, Sarkis.

Armenian: patronymic from an occupational name for a money changer, from Arabic ṣarrāf (see Sarraf ). This form of the surname is found mainly in the US, Lebanon, and France; in Armenia it is spelled (transliterated) Sarafyan.

variants.name: Saraf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Kishore, Rahul, Raj, Shreekant, Alok, Amitabh, Anil, Anupama, Aparna, Arvind, Krishna, Neeraj.

Indian (Gujarat and Mumbai): Vania and Parsi name, from Gujarati səraf ‘money changer’, from Arabic ṣarrāf. There has been some confusion with Arabic ṣarīf ‘noble’, which has also been borrowed into Hindi and other modern Indian languages. Compare Shroff .

nameMeanings.name: Girard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz was born in 1177, in Vaud, Switzerland, his father, Ebles IV de Grandson, was 24 and his mother, Beatrix Genève, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Antoinette d’Oron. He died on 28 September 1233, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz est né en 1177, à Vaud, Suisse, son père, Ebles IV de Grandson, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Genève, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Antoinette d’Oron. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1233, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz 1177 in Waadt, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebles IV de Grandson 24 und seine Mutter Beatrix Genève 23. Er hatte mit Antoinette d’Oron mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1233 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz è nato il nel 1177 nel Vaud, Svizzera, il suo padre, Ebles IV de Grandson, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Genève, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Antoinette d’Oron. Morì il 28 settembre 1233, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Neuchâtel, Switzerland: スイスネウエンブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Girard de Grandson-la Sarrazが1177年にスイスヴァウドで生まれた時，父Ebles IV de Grandsonは24歳，母Beatrix Genèveは23歳であった。彼はAntoinette d’Oronとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1233年9月28日に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz(이)가 1177년 스위스 바드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebles IV de Grandson(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Genève(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Antoinette d’Oron(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 9월 28일 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz nasceu em 1177, em Vaud, Suiça, seu pai, Ebles IV de Grandson, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Genève, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Antoinette d’Oron. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1233, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz родился в 1177 г. в местности вауд, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Ebles IV de Grandson было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Genève, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Antoinette d’Oron. Он умер 28 сентября 1233 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Girard de Grandson-la Sarraz nació en 1177, en Vaud, Suiza, su papá, Ebles IV de Grandson, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Beatrix Genève, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Antoinette d’Oron. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1233, a la edad de 56 años.
